content:
🌟 HeroicGamesLauncher | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified and open-source game launcher for users to access and play games from various digital distribution platforms on their desktop operating systems.
✨ Key Features: • Supports Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games. • Cross-platform compatibility (Linux, Windows, macOS). • Built with web technologies (TypeScript, React, Electron).
📖 Summary: Heroic Games Launcher is an open-source game launcher that allows users to manage and play games from multiple digital storefronts including Epic Games Store, GOG, and Amazon Games. It supports Linux, Windows, and macOS, leveraging web technologies for its development.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
